headline: KeyCorp bulks up investment banking with purchase of UK firm
summary: The Cleveland-based regional bank plans to acquire Clearwater UK, a middle-market investment banking advisory firm. The transaction marks Key's first entry into the Western European market.

headline: KeyCorp to Acquire Clearwater UK, Expanding Financial Advisory Capabilities
summary: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) today announced a definitive agreement to acquire Clearwater Corporate Finance LLP (Clearwater UK), a leading UK-based middle market investment banking advisory firm. The transaction will mark Key's strategic entry into the Western European market, expanding its ability to provide financial advisory services to institutional clients.
